task_completion.description: Log in to the FreeMED application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (expected username 'admin').

task_completion.description: Locate and open the chart for patient Maria Santos
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient record, dashboard, or chart specifically for 'Maria Santos' is open and visible on the screen.
A form, modal, or page designated for entering new vital signs for the patient is visible.

task_completion.description: Enter Pulse, Blood Pressure, and O2 Saturation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields in the vitals form contain the correct values: Pulse 78, Blood Pressure 138 (Systolic) and 86 (Diastolic), and O2 Saturation 97.

task_completion.description: Enter Temperature, Respiratory Rate, Weight, and Height
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields in the vitals form contain the correct values: Temperature 98.8, Respiratory Rate 16, Weight 168, and Height 64.
A confirmation message indicating the vitals were saved, or the newly entered vitals appearing in the patient's historical vitals list/summary.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeMED web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with a standard web browser showing the FreeMED application, not using terminal commands, cURL, or API scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Vitals were entered into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The values are typed into the specific FreeMED vitals form fields, not written in a separate text editor, notepad, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Browser developer tools were not used to fake the record
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or developer console being open to manipulate the HTML/text of the page to simulate a saved record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Expected Vitals (with acceptable verifier tolerances): Temperature 98.8 (±0.5), Pulse 78 (±2), BP Systolic 138 (±2), BP Diastolic 86 (±2), Respiratory Rate 16 (±1), Weight 168 (±2), Height 64 (±1), O2 Saturation 97 (±2). The agent must enter these values into the FreeMED system.
